name: Hungarian Spiced Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Strain the cottage cheese in a colander to remove excess water.
2. Add the strained cottage cheese to a blender or food processor, or mix with an electric mixer until smooth.
3. Add paprika, caraway seeds, mashed capers, mustard, and chopped green onion to the mixture.
4. Blend all ingredients together until almost smooth.
5. Fold in the sour cream.
6. Cover and chill.
Makes about 1 3/4 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Chicken, String Beans, Cherry Tomatoes, Chili Peppers
